ServerCard Trust MCP

Paid remote MCP for server-card validation, auth checks, trust packets, and readiness.

Website: https://servercardtrust.space/
MCP endpoint: https://servercardtrust.space/mcp
Server card: https://servercardtrust.space/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json
Registry name: space.servercardtrust/servercardtrust-mcp
Auth: Authorization: Bearer <token> after checkout and token claim.
Boundary: read-only fixed tools for MCP server-card validation; no arbitrary shell, arbitrary SQL, deployment, deletion, or payment configuration tools.
